html:
Exclusive to:

Broken Machinery are fragmented Structures from a technical device surrounding an Unnatural Portal. In appearance, they resemble the inventions of Grainy Transmission. They can be destroyed with a Hammer to obtain Scrap, Gears and Frazzled Wires.

Gallery

  • Broken Machinery Concept Art shown in Rhymes With Play stream.
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Broken Machinery
1
2
3
Source
Can be Hammered
Resources
85% 25% 25% ()
Miscellaneous
"monkeyisland_portal_debris"
“This machinery looks oddly familiar...”
–Wilson
“What's with all this metal junk all over the place?”
–Willow
“Wolfgang almost stubbed his mighty toe on it!”
–Wolfgang
“The scattered remains of some ill-fated machine.”
–Wendy
“WHERE ARE YOU HIDING OLD MAN”
–WX-78
“I highly doubt the apes I encountered are intelligent enough to have constructed it.”
–Wickerbottom
“Did the monkeys leave this here?”
–Woodie
“Someone has been meddling.”
–Maxwell
“It doth not seem to belong here.”
–Wigfrid
“What's that metal stuff?”
–Webber
“These metal bits seem rather out of place.”
–Warly
“Hmmm”
–Wormwood
“This looks like the bossman's... but what was he doing out here?”
–Winona
“Hyuyuyu, someone's been up to some mischief!”
–Wortox
“Look like scale-less machine bits.”
–Wurt
“People really shouldn't leave their litter lying around.”
–Walter
“I should've remembered sooner. Too late now, I suppose.”
–Wanda
Broken Machinery are fragmented Structures from a technical device surrounding an Unnatural Portal. In appearance, they resemble the inventions of Grainy Transmission. They can be destroyed with a Hammer to obtain Scrap, Gears and Frazzled Wires.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Broken Machinery Concept Art shown in Rhymes With Play stream.

'''Broken Machinery''' are fragmented [[Structures]] from a technical device surrounding an [[Unnatural Portal]]. In appearance, they resemble the inventions of [[Grainy Transmission]]. They can be destroyed with a [[Hammer]] to obtain [[Scrap]], [[Gears]] and [[Trinkets|Frazzled Wires]].
